title: Goku Star Platinum (JCraft: EOE)
description: Replaces SP and SPTW skin3 with Goku (JOJO, JJBA)
body:
Replaces SP and SPTW skin3 with Goku

Hard choice between making SPTW Super Saiyan or not but I'll probably just make a few versions of Goku (SS1, SS Blue, UI, etc)

https://www.planetminecraft.com/skin/goku-base-de-la-buu-saga

Changes the apparence of your JoJo stand

Type "Subsetg4ming" in your search bar to find everything by me!
